title: Data and Code: Host-derived organic acids enable gut colonization of the honey bee symbiont Snodgrassella alvi
author: Quinn, Andrew
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: Raw data and codes underlying the CFU count, qPCR, metabolomics, and NanoSIMS data for the paper "Host-derived organic acids enable gut colonization of the honey bee symbiont Snodgrassella alvi". Data is subdivided by main figure in the paper. Additionally, raw GC-MS datafiles (.cdf) are provided in separate folders.
